case_title: CONRAD HOUSE, INCORPORATED VS. NAO KUBOYAMA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRAD HOUSE, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT KUBOYAMA, NAO DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRAD HOUSE, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT KUBOYAMA, NAO

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRAD HOUSE, INCORPORATED SERVED JUN-02-2016, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KUBOYAMA, NAO
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND PERMITTING ENTRY OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRAD HOUSE, INCORPORATED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT KUBOYAMA, NAO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRAD HOUSE, INCORPORATED ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KUBOYAMA, NAO

DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT NAO KUBOYAMA IN OPPOSITION TO REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KUBOYAMA, NAO
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRAD HOUSE, INCORPORATED
SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF NAO KUBOYAMA IN OPPOS. TO REQ. FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KUBOYAMA, NAO
SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF MARKYLE HENDERSON IN SUPPORT OF EXPARTE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRAD HOUSE, INCORPORATED
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT; THIS ORDER IS STAYED TO GIVE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO PAY (SEE RADCO LETTER) BY MARCH 7, 2017. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONRAD HOUSE, INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUBOYAMA, NAO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1844 MCALLISTER STREET, #3, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115. $564.00 RENT, $500.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,064.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-07-2017, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT; THIS JUDGMENT IS STAYED PER ORDER. PLAINTIFF MAY ATTAIN A UNIT AFTER MARCH 7, 2017 IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH ORDER. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES BY MARCH 7, 2017 THIS JUDGMENT AND ORDER SHALL BE NULL AND VOID.
DECLARATION OF SHEPHALI IDES IN SUPPORT OF NAO KUBOYAMA'S OPPOSITION TO REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT (SUPPLEMENTAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT KUBOYAMA, NAO
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON NOV-04-2025.
